# DREi Studio

> Research, design, and strategy studio helping teams build better products with emerging technologies.

DREi Studio is led by Dr. Sarah Mennicken, a human-computer interaction researcher and product strategist. She works with startups and product teams as an advisor and hands-on collaborator — helping them cut through complexity, identify what matters most, and find the fastest path to validated outcomes.

Her approach blends deep expertise in user research and human-centered design with practical coaching on product strategy, prioritization, and framing. Whether it's shaping an AI interaction concept, pressure-testing a pitch narrative, or running a design sprint, the goal is always to help teams move forward with clarity and confidence.

## How She Works

- Strategic advisory and product coaching for early-stage teams
- User research and product discovery (interviews, usability studies, design sprints)
- Rapid prototyping and concept validation
- Framing, narrative, and go-to-market strategy support

## Background

Sarah has worked with teams at Spotify, Google, and Microsoft Research on product discovery, voice AI, multimodal experiences, and AR/VR. She holds a PhD in human-computer interaction.

## Notable Clients

- Spotify — product discovery, voice AI, multimodal experiences
- Google — user research
- Microsoft Research — AR/VR user research
- RESET Tech — voice AI UX advisory
- This One — product discovery, design sprints

## Contact

- Email: hello@dreistudio.ch
- Website: https://dreistudio.ch

## Usage Policy

This content is provided for informational purposes only. Training or fine-tuning AI models on the content of this website is not permitted.
